entries.source: "Build a map of democracy"
entries.value: "Yakha imephu yentando yeningi"

entries.source: "Connect algebra concepts"
entries.value: "Xhumanisa imiqondo ye-algebra"

entries.source: "Map climate change"
entries.value: "Mepha ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Concept Map Builder on inspir for thinking learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Umhlahlandlela osebenzayo wokusebenzisa i-Concept Map Builder ku-inspir ukuze kufundwe ukucabanga, unemiyalo, imijikelezo yokufunda, nemikhuba ye-AI ephephile.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Umjikelezo wokufunda oqinile

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Vumelanisa iseshini nenhloso yakho.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: uthisha we-AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane kunempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho, hhayi umphumela kuphela.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder
entries.value: Umklami Wemephu Yemiqondo

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Concept Map Builder iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Mepha ukuthi imibono ihlobana kanjani, kusukela ezimbangeleni nemiphumeleni kuya ezigabeni, izibonelo, nokuphikisana.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Concept Map Builder: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Connect ideas visually in text.
entries.value: Xhumanisa imibono ngokubonakalayo embhalweni.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Qeda ngokubhala umqondo futhi usuka enkumbulweni.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Abafundi abahlola izihloko zokucabanga abafuna isiqondiso esiwusizo esikhundleni sebhokisi lezimpendulo elijwayelekile.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Imiyalo ongayizama

entries.source: Start the live mode at Concept Map Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Misconception Doctor. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Qala imodi ebukhoma ku-Concept Map Builder. Uma ufuna ifomethi yokufunda eseduze, zama i-Misconception Doctor. Ukuze ubone inkundla kabanzi, funda ukuthi umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kufanele enzele wonke umuntu ini.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Qala ngemiyalo eyisibonelo.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tshela imodi ukuthi uzama ukufunda noma ukukhiqiza ini.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Lowo mehluko ubonakala ekugelezeni. Esikhundleni sempendulo eyodwa enkulu, amasession angcono adlula emjikelezweni: setha inhloso, zama okuthile, thola impendulo, lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka, bese ukhetha isenzo esilandelayo.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Lokho kugxila kubalulekile. I-chatbot evamile ingaphendula cishe noma yini, kodwa imodi yokufunda inikeza ingxoxo isimo. Ikusunduza ohlotsheni lokucabanga, ukuzijwayeza, impendulo, noma ukuhlola okusiza umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: Ukucabanga

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Lona umkhuba ofanayo ongemuva kokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI iwusizo kakhulu lapho ikunikeza impendulo ngokucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Le modi iwusizo ikakhulukazi kubafundi abafuna uku:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for concept map builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Le ndlela ilungiselelwe umklami wemephu yemiqondo enezikhuthazo zayo, izibonelo, nokugeleza kokufunda.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Zama isinyathelo ngamazwi akho.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Concept Map Builder uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Lokho le modi esiza ngakho

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Lapho ongaya khona ngokulandelayo

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ungaqala futhi ngenguqulo engahlelwanga yenkinga yakho yangempela. Umyalo wokuqala ongacocekile ulungile. Iseshini ingacacisa izinga, izethameli, umnqamulajuqu, nesitayela uma usuqalile.
